stories.title: Muchova ends Gauff's run at Wimbledon in semis
stories.summary: Karolina Muchova ended Coco Gauff's run at Wimbledon with a 6-2, 2-6, 7-6 (10) victory Thursday that ended with a drama-filled tiebreaker, to become the fourth Czech woman in the past six years to reach the final of the grass-court Grand Slam.

stories.title: Sources: Pulisic has microfracture, bone bruise
stories.summary: United States international and AC Milan attacker Christian Pulisic sustained a bone bruise and microfracture in his lower leg and will be sidelined for several weeks, sources confirmed to ESPN.

stories.title: Commanders to retire No. 44 of HOF RB Riggins
stories.summary: The Commanders are retiring the No. 44 worn by Hall of Famer and franchise rushing leader John Riggins -- more than 40 years after one of the most famous runs in Super Bowl history.
